summary: Today's AI news is filled with breakthroughs and advancements, from Google DeepMind's new AI research lab in the UK to Uber's substantial investment in AI coding budget. Carnegie Mellon University has launched a Physical AI Research Institute, while Meta AI is planning to roll out a major expansion of artificial intelligence tools across its advertising business. The 2026 AI Index Report from Stanford University provides insights into the latest AI trends and job market demands.

highlights.title: How Netflix's AI Really Works: The 2026 Engagement Engine
highlights.insight: Netflix's AI uses machine learning to predict if a user will watch the next episode and begins prefetched loading in the background to improve user experience.

highlights.title: AI Co-Mathematician: Accelerating Mathematicians with Agentic AI
highlights.insight: A new paper on arXiv explores the concept of an AI co-mathematician, which aims to accelerate mathematical research with agentic AI.

highlights.title: DoorDash Applies AI to Safety across Chat and Calls, Cutting Incidents by 50%
highlights.insight: DoorDash has deployed an AI-driven safety system called SafeChat to moderate conversations between Dashers and customers, resulting in a 50% reduction in incidents.

highlights.title: Carnegie Mellon Launches Physical AI Research Institute
highlights.insight: Carnegie Mellon University has launched a Physical AI Research Institute in partnership with Fujitsu to develop AI-powered machines and robots for practical applications.

highlights.title: The Complete Hugging Face Primer for 2026
highlights.insight: Hugging Face has released a comprehensive primer for 2026, providing an overview of its models, features, and applications in the AI landscape.

highlights.title: Google DeepMind Announces New AI Research Lab in the UK
highlights.insight: Google DeepMind has announced the opening of a new AI research lab in the UK, focusing on automated research and discovery of new materials.

highlights.title: 2026 AI Index Report
highlights.insight: The 2026 AI Index Report from Stanford University provides insights into the latest AI trends, job market demands, and the impact of AI on various industries.

highlights.title: Meta's AI Advertising Plans: What To Expect in 2026
highlights.insight: Meta AI is planning to roll out a major expansion of artificial intelligence tools across its advertising business, aiming to automate ad creation and improve user experience.

highlights.title: This is MIT CSAIL: 2026
highlights.insight: MIT CSAIL has released a video showcasing its research and advancements in AI, computer vision, and other areas, highlighting the potential of AI to transform industries.

highlights.title: Uber Spends Full 2026 AI Budget in 4 Months
highlights.insight: Uber has spent its entire AI coding budget for 2026 in just four months, highlighting the company's significant investment in AI research and development.

highlights.title: Anthropic Claude News | March, 2026
highlights.insight: Anthropic has released updates on its Claude model, focusing on safe and high-performance AI, and addressing issues related to AI misuse and national security risks.
